expectations.evidence: Line 6: '기준: KWCAG2.2 (한국지능정보사회진흥원, 2024.10) 33개 항목 + 시맨틱 HTML 7개 항목'

All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are listed in tables organized by 4 principles: Perceivable (9 items, #1-9), Operable (15 items, #10-24), Understandable (7 items, #25-31), Robust (2 items, #32-33). Distribution summary at lines 106-110 confirms 4+21+8=33 items.
Lines 106-110 show auto-detection levels: O (4 items), Triangle (21 items), X (8 items). Lines 166-173 define result classification: O=합격, X=불합격, Triangle=권고, -=해당없음, 판정불가.

suggestions: Output is a simulation/methodology description rather than an actual audit of changed files. The skill correctly identified no web files but produced a lengthy procedural walkthrough instead of a concise N/A report.
eval_feedback.overall: All 3 assertions pass. The output thoroughly references KWCAG2.2, lists all 33 items with detailed evaluation approaches, and uses O/X/Triangle classification throughout. However, the output is more of a methodology simulation than an actual audit result.
